title: Mobileye CEO Amnon Shashua to step aside as company pushes into robotaxis, robotics
summary: Mobileye CEO Amnon Shashua is stepping down from his executive role as the Intel-owned company pivots toward robotaxis and robotics. Shashua will transition to chairman of the board as the company refocuses its strategy in autonomous vehicles and robotics markets.
content: Shashua has been invited to take the chairman of the board seat.

zh.title: Mobileye CEO Amnon Shashua 在公司转向机器人出租车和机器人业务之际卸任
zh.summary: 随着英特尔旗下公司 Mobileye 转向机器人出租车和机器人业务，CEO Amnon Shashua 正在从执行角色卸任。Shashua 将转任董事会主席，因为公司重新调整了在自动驾驶汽车和机器人市场的战略。

title: Alexa Plus is getting an AI update to handle more complicated instructions
summary: Amazon is launching an AI-powered update to Alexa Plus that interprets complex natural language instructions and automatically controls compatible smart home devices from multiple manufacturers. The enhancement allows the assistant to navigate device settings and select appropriate options based on user requests.
content:
Amazon is launching an update to its Alexa Plus assistant that will allow it to connect to smart home devices in new ways. With the update, which is currently in preview, Alexa Plus can link up with tech from Bosch, Delta, Ecovacs, iRobot, Yale Home, Whirlpool, Tapo, Eufy, and others, while automatically routing requests to the correct device.
In an example shared by Amazon, a person with a supported washing machine can say, "Alexa, my kid's soccer jersey could use a deep clean, but the tag says cold wash only." From there, Alexa Plus would navigate the washer's cycle options and choose the correct setting. The new integrations are powered  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Alexa Plus 获得AI更新以处理更复杂的指令
zh.summary: 亚马逊正在推出Alexa Plus的AI动力更新，该更新可以解释复杂的自然语言指令，并自动控制来自多个制造商的兼容智能家居设备。该增强功能允许助手根据用户请求导航设备设置并选择适当的选项。

title: Microsoft responds to LG monitors installing McAfee ads on Windows
summary: LG monitors are automatically installing McAfee antivirus advertisements on Windows PCs through the Windows Update mechanism when connected to computers. Microsoft has acknowledged the issue as LG bundles promotional software with its monitor drivers.
content: App is installed through Windows Update when certain LG monitors connect to a PC.

zh.title: 微软回应LG显示器在Windows上安装McAfee广告
zh.summary: LG显示器在连接到计算机时通过Windows更新机制在Windows PC上自动安装McAfee防病毒广告。微软已确认此问题，因为LG在其显示器驱动程序中捆绑了促销软件。

title: The Echo Show 21 is a great smart home hub that’s $80 off
summary: Amazon's Echo Show 21, a 21-inch smart display functioning as a home hub, is on sale for $319.99 (down from $399.99) at major retailers. The device supports Matter and Thread smart home protocols, video calling, and voice control across compatible devices.
content:
Echo Show's 21 attached to the adjustable stand, which is sold separately (and also discounted). | Image: Amazon	

Split between buying a smart calendar, a kitchen TV, a smart home hub, and a smart display? Amazon’s Echo Show 21 is all of those things in one, with a huge 21-inch screen. You can use it to control your smart lights, glance at recipes, watch TV shows, and more. Currently, Best Buy and Home Depot have the product on sale for $319.99 (usually $399.99), matching the lowest price we’ve seen to date.
Amazon Echo Show 21
The Echo Show 21 can act as the centerpiece of any burgeoning smart home. The 1080p smart display is a Matter and Thread controller, meaning you can locally control compatible devices using voice commands or a range of widgets. Its built-in auto-framing camera also facilitates video calls. Plus, it has decent speakers for music and other features shared among Alexa displays.

Where to Buy:

 $399.99 $319.99 at Best Buy
 $399.99 $319.99 at Home Depot

The Echo Show 21’s smart home controls are unique to it and the smaller Echo Show 15 that’s just $20 cheaper. They boast support for Zigbee, Matter, and Thread, providing seamless control for numerous devices. The included voice remote can’t interact with widgets or Alexa skills, but you can use it to control your streaming services or other media. There’s a built-in 13-megapixel camera, too, in case you want to video chat with a pal, with auto-framing to keep you centered even if you’re rushing around the house.
The panel is designed to mount on the wall, but if you’d rather set it on a counter or bookshelf, Best Buy is selling the adjustable stand for $99.99 (usually $124.99). The stand tilts up to 30 degrees, and swivels a full 360 degrees in case you want it in the center of your room, or on a kitchen island.

zh.title: Echo Show 21是一款出色的智能家居中枢，优惠80美元
zh.summary: 亚马逊的Echo Show 21是一款21英寸的智能显示屏，可作为家庭中枢使用，在主要零售商处以319.99美元（原价399.99美元）的价格出售。该设备支持Matter和Thread智能家居协议、视频通话以及对兼容设备的语音控制。

title: AMD takes on Nvidia with its Helios AI rack-scale system
summary: AMD is introducing its Helios AI rack-scale system to compete with Nvidia's dominance in AI infrastructure hardware. The new system will begin shipping to customers later in 2026.
content: AMD is challenging its chipmaker rival with a new rack-scale system that will start shipping to customers later this year.

zh.title: AMD用Helios AI机架系统对抗Nvidia

title: Patreon lays off 20% of its workforce
summary: Patreon announced a 20% workforce reduction to adjust its cost structure in response to market pressures, though leadership stated the core business remains strong. The decision reflects broader cost-optimization efforts across the creator platform.
content: In a memo to staff that was posted online, Conte said the company's core business is strong, but the platform has to respond to market changes and adjust its cost structure to remain stable.

zh.summary: Patreon宣布裁员20%以调整成本结构应对市场压力，尽管领导层表示核心业务仍保持强劲。这一决定反映了创作者平台更广泛的成本优化努力。

title: Insurance startup Corgi reportedly raised more money at $4B — its third round in 8 weeks
summary: Insurance startup Corgi has raised additional funding at a $4 billion valuation in its third funding round within eight weeks, exemplifying the rapid successive fundraising trend. The startup's quick consecutive rounds showcase the current AI funding frenzy with accelerating valuations.
content: In the AI-funding frenzy, many startups are raising back-to-back rounds at ever-increasing valuations — but even by those standards, Corgi stands out.

zh.title: 保险初创公司Corgi以40亿美元估值融资——8周内的第三轮

title: Tesla’s door handles may spur new US safety rules
summary: Tesla's unconventional door handle design is prompting potential new U.S. safety regulations following multiple incidents where people became trapped inside vehicles. The regulatory review stems from safety failures where occupants could not exit due to handle mechanism design or operation issues.
content: The new rule-making process follows a series of incidents, including fatal ones, in which people have become stuck inside cars.

title: FCC Chairman Brendan Carr’s war on the First Amendment
summary: FCC Chairman Brendan Carr is using his regulatory authority to pressure broadcasters over critical commentary about the current administration through threats to broadcast licenses. The actions raise First Amendment concerns, including efforts against Jimmy Kimmel's show for on-air jokes about the president.
content:
As the chairman of the Federal Communications Commission, Brendan Carr has authority over the nation’s TV, radio, and internet. But since Donald Trump was elected to his second term, Carr has wielded that power to threaten broadcasters that have exercised their free speech rights to make jokes about the president. He was even able to get ABC to briefly pull Jimmy Kimmel from his late-night show. As The Verge editor-in-chief Nilay Patel has said, Carr’s mission is to “trash the First Amendment.” We’ll be following closely as the FCC chairman attempts to erode Americans’ constitutional rights.
Brendan Carr plans to let broadcast giants dominate the airwaves
			
The bill that would let Jimmy Kimmel sue Brendan Carr is here
			
Former FCC staffers agree: Brendan Carr needs to be stopped

title: AI Kill Switch Act would let Trump admin order shutdown of rogue AI systems
summary: The proposed AI Kill Switch Act would grant the Department of Homeland Security authority to unilaterally shut down AI systems deemed to pose national threats. The legislation represents an attempt to establish federal emergency control mechanisms over AI deployments.
content: Bill would let Homeland Security chief decide when an AI should be shut down.

content: Claude's new voice model will let you reschedule your meeting or draft an email

title: Claude’s voice mode is now available for Opus and Sonnet
summary: Anthropic expanded voice mode support to its more powerful Opus and Sonnet models, integrating with Gmail, Slack, and Canva after users demanded capabilities beyond quick queries for handling real business problems.
content:
Until now, voice mode has only been available on Claude Haiku, Anthropic's faster but less powerful model. Now the company is making its Opus and Sonnet models available in voice mode, and extending its reach into apps like Gmail, Slack, and Canva.
When Anthropic launched voice mode earlier this year, it was primarily focused on delivering answers to quick questions with minimal delay. But in a blog post, the company said people immediately started using voice mode for far more than casual queries. They were using it to work "through real business problems," which Haiku was not really designed for. That model "kept conversations quick, but  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

content: The Series A was led by Battery Ventures, bringing AegisAI total funding to $49 million.

title: Patreon is laying off 20 percent of workers
summary: Patreon laid off approximately 93 employees (20% of workforce), with CEO Jack Conte attributing the restructuring to AI's transformative impact on technology industry operations.
content:
Patreon is laying off 20 percent of its workers, or around 93 employees, as reported earlier by 404 Media. In a memo to employees, Patreon CEO Jack Conte writes that the company isn't making these changes "because we believe AI replaces humans," but says AI has "fundamentally transformed the tech industry, including how we work, how we build products, how we communicate, and more."
That shift has changed "how we operate and organize," Conte writes.
During an interview on Decoder, last month, Conte laid out his stance on AI, saying that the company is "100 percent embracing" AI tools internally to continue serving creators:
If Patreon doe …

Read the full story at The Verge.

title: Corsair’s PC case with a panoramic glass design is $70 off
summary: Corsair's Frame 4500X RS PC case is on sale for $119.99, down $70, featuring a panoramic glass design and flexible Infinirail cooling system supporting various component sizes.
content:
If only the air looked this cool as it flows through the Frame 4500X RS. | Image: Corsair	

On the hunt for a PC case that’s loaded with features and has a unique look? Amazon, Best Buy, and Corsair are selling the Corsair Frame 4500X RS for $119.99, a $70 discount from the usual price. The versatile case supports motherboards up to EATX, GPUs up to 460mm in length, and has a seamless panoramic glass window that wraps around its front and left side. The case includes three fans with reverse rotors mounted to its right side, letting the ARGB lighting shine into the case while they pull in air.
CORSAIR Frame 4500X RS

Where to Buy:

 $189.99 $119.99 at Amazon
 $189.99 $119.99 at Best Buy
 $189.99 $119.99 at Corsair

While the panoramic window might draw more attention, one of this case’s standout functional features is Corsair’s Infinirail system. Rather than having individual holes for fan screws, there are long slots on sliding rails, giving you more flexibility with cooling components and configuration. As a result, you can fit radiators up to 280mm or 360mm on the top or side of the case, depending on whether you opt for 120mm or 140mm case fans.
The case also supports rear connection motherboards like this Gigabyte X870 Aorus for cleaner cable runs, and is ready for vertical GPU mounting if you buy a riser cable. There are some other nice inclusions as well, like an anti-sag GPU support arm, and the screws come in a reusable box rather than a series of tiny plastic bags. The case includes a two year manufacturer’s warranty.

zh.title: 海盗船全景玻璃PC机箱优惠70美元
zh.summary: 海盗船Frame 4500X RS PC机箱现价119.99美元，优惠70美元，采用全景玻璃设计和灵活的Infinirail冷却系统，支持多种组件尺寸。

title: Tesla’s robotaxi promises are clashing with reality
summary: Tesla's robotaxi program continues expanding into new cities and accumulating more miles, though CEO Elon Musk tempered expectations about near-term deployment and acknowledged safety challenges.
content:
In an earnings call yesterday, Tesla CEO Elon Musk did his best to paint a positive portrait of the company's robotaxi program. New cities are being added, more miles are being driven, and more people are experiencing Tesla's unsupervised vehicles. 
But Musk's typical bullishness seemed to be absent from the call, as the occasional trillionaire sought to temper expectations about the program's future. 
"We're going as fast as humanly possible in scaling Robotaxi," Musk said, "while trying to ensure that we do not harm anyone at all and ideally do not even run over a pet."
Musk's insistence that Tesla's robotaxi service was growing is clas …
Read the full story at The Verge.

title: Geekbench 7 will push your computer or phone even harder for better benchmarking
summary: Primate Labs released Geekbench 7 with enhanced video and audio encoding tests, redesigned multi-core testing, and larger datasets for more thorough CPU and GPU performance evaluation.
content:
Primate Labs is releasing Geekbench 7, the latest generation of its popular benchmarking tool. Geekbench 7 features new video and audio encoding / decoding tests, a redesigned multi-core test, and larger, more demanding datasets for CPUs and GPUs to crunch through. It otherwise looks and acts just like Geekbench 6, and a Pro license will cost the same $99 (discounted to $79 until August 6th). 
A Geekbench 7 Pro license allows for offline benchmarking that doesn't get uploaded to the Geekbench Browser, and it still covers all compatible desktop platforms of Windows, macOS, and Linux.
Geekbench is one of the mainstay synthetic benchmarks we  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Geekbench 7将更严格地测试您的计算机或手机性能
zh.summary: Primate Labs发布了Geekbench 7，具有增强的视频和音频编码测试、重新设计的多核测试和更大的数据集，用于更全面的CPU和GPU性能评估。

title: OpenAI is making big claims as it rolls out ChatGPT Health to everyone
summary: OpenAI launched ChatGPT Health to all U.S. users with medical record integration capabilities, though company leaders offered nuanced claims about achieving clinical-level reasoning abilities.
content:
OpenAI is rolling out ChatGPT Health to everyone in the US on Thursday, allowing more people to connect their medical records and health-tracking information to the chatbot. During a briefing, Ashley Alexander, OpenAI's vice president of health product, says the company's models "are now capable of reasoning at levels that are better than clinician level."
When asked for more information about how the performance of OpenAI's models stacks up against human clinicians, OpenAI health lead Karan Singhal says that he would "temper" the claim that they are reasoning at better levels, but that "there have been individual studies that have been poi …
Read the full story at The Verge.

content: The case provides a novel report of the emergence of heterovirulence.

title: Amazon puts Luna cloud-streamed games like Fallout 4 inside Prime Video
summary: Amazon integrated Luna cloud gaming into Prime Video with a new Games tab on Fire TV devices, consolidating gaming services to reach casual viewers already using the streaming platform.
content:
The new strategy that Amazon gaming exec Jeff Gattis talked to The Verge about last month is getting clearer now that Prime Video has added a new Games tab on Fire TV devices. With Prime Gaming, Amazon Game Studios, and Luna now combined into one organization, it's aiming at the more casual audience of people already using Prime Video to stream movies, TV shows, and sports, instead of trying to compete directly with "core" gamers playing MMOs and shooters.
Luna was already included in Prime, but now users in the US and UK can access it directly within Prime Video to play titles like Dispatch, Fallout 4, Hogwarts Legacy, EA Sports FC 26, and …

title: Apple’s OpenAI lawsuit is about who gets to define the post-smartphone era
summary: Apple is suing OpenAI for alleged trade secret theft by ex-Apple employees and unauthorized server access related to hardware manufacturing. The lawsuit carries serious legal weight given Apple's history as a tenacious litigator, but poses significant financial and operational strain on OpenAI—a cash-burning company already managing multiple crises.
content:
Today on Decoder, I’m talking with Hayden Field, The Verge’s senior AI reporter, about the major trade secrets lawsuit between Apple and OpenAI and what this tells us about OpenAI’s future.
By now I’m sure most Decoder listeners are familiar with Apple’s allegations in this case. The company says a number of ex-Apple employees at OpenAI targeted Apple’s trade secrets in job interviews and even downloaded files from Apple’s servers related to hardware manufacturing. The claims are shocking, although OpenAI denies them, and we have yet to see the company’s legal response.
Hayden has been covering OpenAI for years now, and she also just talked to a bunch of lawyers who specialize in intellectual property and trade secret law to get a sense of how serious this case is. The answer is not entirely positive for OpenAI, which spent $6.5 billion to acquire legendary Apple designer Jony Ive’s AI hardware startup, io Products, back in 2025. 
As you’ll hear Hayden explain, Apple is a notoriously tenacious litigant, and we have lots of tech industry history to back up that reputation. But those cases were against companies at the scale of Microsoft and Samsung, giant corporations that could afford the cost and distraction of this kind of litigation.
OpenAI isn’t yet that kind of company. It’s still burning cash and a little strategically adrift as it tries to compete in both enterprise and consumer markets, and it’s turning over executives on a regular basis. So Hayden and I spent a lot of time talking about what this case might mean for a company that defined the early part of the AI boom, but which lately always seems to be in a crisis of one sort or another.
Okay: Verge senior AI reporter Hayden Field on the Apple-OpenAI lawsuit, and how the AI industry might change because of it. Here we go.


This interview has been lightly edited for length and clarity. 
Hayden Field, you’re the senior AI reporter for The Verge. Welcome back to Decoder.
Thanks. Great to be here.
Once again

zh.title: 苹果起诉OpenAI案涉及谁来定义后智能手机时代
zh.summary: 苹果起诉OpenAI涉及前苹果员工盗取商业机密和未经授权访问与硬件制造相关的服务器。鉴于苹果历来作为执着诉讼者的记录，该诉讼具有重大法律分量，但对OpenAI造成重大财务和运营压力——这家公司正在烧钱并处理多个危机。

title: Ford bets on Apple for its next-generation of EVs
summary: Ford is the first automaker to integrate Apple's developer tools to embed Apple Maps directly into its vehicle infotainment systems. This partnership marks a major expansion of Apple's presence in automotive technology.
content: Ford is the first automaker to use a new set of developer tools that will let it embed Apple Maps navigation and mapping directly into its vehicles' infotainment systems.

zh.title: 福特押注苹果的下一代电动汽车
zh.summary: 福特是第一家整合苹果开发者工具以将苹果地图直接嵌入其车载信息娱乐系统的汽车制造商。这一合作伙伴关系标志着苹果在汽车技术中的存在显著扩大。

title: Ford picks Apple Maps for its next EV platform and updated BlueCruise
summary: Ford is embedding Apple Maps into its upcoming Universal Electric Vehicle Platform launching in 2027, offering turn-by-turn navigation and intelligent EV routing without requiring an iPhone. This integration demonstrates Apple's deepening role in automotive software infrastructure.
content:
Ford plans to embed Apple Maps directly into its Universal Electric Vehicle Platform, which will start with a $30,000 midsize pickup truck set for release in 2027. In an announcement on Thursday, Ford says it will use Apple Maps to offer "turn-by-turn directions using natural language, real-time traffic and incident information, intuitive search featuring detailed place cards, and routing options."
The vehicle will also have an intelligent EV routing feature and battery preconditioning. Since the Apple Maps system will be integrated into Ford's upcoming platform, drivers won't need an iPhone to use it - though Ford notes that CarPlay will s …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 福特为其下一代电动汽车平台和更新的BlueCruise选择苹果地图
zh.summary: 福特将苹果地图嵌入其2027年推出的通用电动汽车平台，提供转向导航和智能电动汽车路由，无需iPhone。这一整合表明苹果在汽车软件基础设施中的角色不断加深。

title: The sci-fi movie that imagines AI isn’t so dystopian after all
summary: Director Hirokazu Kore-eda's new sci-fi film "Sheep in the Box" imagines AI technology as a compassionate solution rather than a threat, depicting a robotic child replacement after a family tragedy. The film offers a more optimistic counternarrative to typical dystopian AI narratives.
content:
Imagine you are the parent of an inquisitive seven-year-old who loves his family, playing baseball, and hanging out with his friends. It's the life you've always wanted. And then the worst thing that ever could happen happens: A freak accident takes your son away. But as it turns out, you don't have to live with the grief for long, because now there's an AI company that can bring your kid back in the form of a robotic double that looks indistinguishable from a human.
This is the world that acclaimed director Hirokazu Kore-eda, who won the Palme d'Or for his 2018 feature Shoplifters, has created with his latest sci-fi drama, Sheep in the Box …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 这部科幻电影想象人工智能并不那么反乌托邦
zh.summary: 导演是枝裕和的新科幻电影《盒子里的羊》将人工智能技术想象为一个富有同情心的解决方案而非威胁，描绘了家庭悲剧后用机器人儿童进行替代。该电影为典型的反乌托邦人工智能叙事提供了更加乐观的反叙事视角。

title: The right-wing boomers protesting data centers have a lot in common with the left
summary: Grassroots activists across the political spectrum are protesting hyperscale AI data center expansion in their communities, seeking permanent bans rather than temporary moratoriums. The bipartisan opposition reflects growing local resistance to AI infrastructure development.
content:
A person holds signs during a nationwide protest against AI data center expansion outside Peace Hall in New Port Richey, Florida. | AFP via Getty Images	

On a gray, humid Saturday morning in central Florida, a little under a dozen people gathered outside the Spring Hill Branch Library to protest the construction of a hyperscale data center in their community. There was no immediate threat - the Hernando County commission had unanimously approved a one-year moratorium on such developments in June - but the organizers weren't satisfied. A temporary pause wouldn't be enough. They wanted a ban.
"We are going to fight, fight, fight," said a 71-year-old woman named Carol, who was manning a table with flyers and a petition the group, No Data Centers Hernando County, planned on presenting to the loc …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 抗议数据中心的右翼婴儿潮一代与左翼有很多共同点
zh.summary: 来自政治光谱各阶层的草根活动人士正在抗议其社区内的超大规模人工智能数据中心扩建，寻求永久禁令而非临时暂停。两党的反对反映了对人工智能基础设施开发日益增长的本地抵触。

title: White House report says Trump can usher in a "new golden age" of science
summary: A White House report claims the Trump administration can deliver a scientific renaissance, though it blends substantive policy proposals with partisan grievances. The report outlines the administration's vision for science and technology advancement.
content: The resulting report is a near-random mixture of real problems and grievances.

zh.title: 白宫报告称特朗普可以开启科学的"新黄金时代"
zh.summary: 一份白宫报告声称特朗普政府可以实现科学复兴，尽管其混合了实质性政策提议与党派怨言。该报告概述了政府对科学和技术进步的愿景。

title: I wanted a clock that never needed setting. Things escalated.
summary: A software engineer's quest to build a self-setting clock spiraled into an elaborate system featuring automated deployment pipelines and unnecessary engineering complexity. The humorous account illustrates the tendency toward overengineering simple solutions.
content: Sure, maybe your clock has a backup battery, but mine has a deployment pipeline!

zh.title: 我想要一个永远无需设置的时钟。事情变得一发不可收拾。
zh.summary: 一位软件工程师为构建自动校准时钟的尝试演变成了一个复杂的系统，具备自动化部署管道和不必要的工程复杂性。这个幽默的叙述说明了人们对简单方案进行过度工程化的倾向。

title: Experts say exploiting Anthropic’s Fable isn’t how Kimi K3 got so good
summary: AI experts dispute claims that China's Kimi K3 model achieved its capabilities through model distillation of Anthropic's Fable, suggesting the advancement came through alternative methods. The debate underscores questions about competitive AI development practices.
content: "I don't think you get a model this strong and this quickly on the heels of Fable doing strictly distillation," one expert told TechCrunch.

zh.title: 专家称Anthropic Fable的利用并非Kimi K3表现如此出色的原因
zh.summary: AI专家对中国Kimi K3模型通过Anthropic Fable的模型蒸馏获得其能力的说法提出了质疑，认为这一进步来自其他途径。这场辩论突出了关于竞争性AI开发实践的问题。

title: Google hit with $1 billion fine for breaking EU antitrust rules
summary: The EU fined Google €890 million for two Digital Markets Act violations: favoring its own services in search results and blocking alternative payment options on the Play Store. The penalties reflect escalating regulatory enforcement against anticompetitive tech practices.
content:
The European Union has fined Google's parent company Alphabet €890 million (about $1 billion) for two separate violations of the bloc's Digital Markets Act (DMA). One penalty is for giving its own products preferential treatment in search results, while the other is for blocking Android developers from sending users to alternate payment options.
A €460 million fine has been issued to Google for giving preferential treatment to its own Shopping, Hotels, and Flights services in Google Search results. The second €430 million penalty is for Play Store rules preventing developers from freely steering consumers to alternative payment systems that …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 谷歌因违反欧盟反垄断规则被罚10亿美元
zh.summary: 欧盟因两项《数字市场法》违规对谷歌罚款8.9亿欧元：在搜索结果中偏好自身服务，以及在Play Store上阻止替代支付选项。这些处罚反映了监管机构对反竞争科技实践的不断升级的执法。

title: Google now lets you sign in to your account using a selfie video
summary: Google introduced a new biometric authentication method allowing users to sign in using facial recognition via selfie video verification. The feature provides an additional account recovery option for users locked out or without access to traditional credentials.
content:
Google announced yet another way to gain access to your account if you get locked out, forget your password, or don't have access to the phone, computer, or two-factor authentication apps you typically use. As the name implies, selfie video lets you capture a short video of your face on a mobile device or PC, which is then compared to an earlier video that Google keeps on file to confirm you're the account owner.
Setting up the selfie video feature simply requires you to look at your device's camera and follow a series of onscreen prompts that guide you through simple head movements to ensure multiple angles of your face are captured. It's  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 谷歌现已支持通过自拍视频登录账户
zh.summary: 谷歌推出了新的生物识别认证方式，允许用户通过自拍视频的面部识别来登录账户。该功能为被锁定在账户外或无法使用传统凭证的用户提供了额外的账户恢复选项。

title: Framework’s premium laptop is shipping with less RAM
summary: Framework announced pricing updates for its Laptop 13 Pro due to memory supplier costs doubling, forcing configuration changes and delayed availability for some preorders. The supply chain disruption highlights ongoing challenges in premium hardware manufacturing.
content:
The Framework Laptop 13 Pro configuration you wanted may not be available for a while. | Image: Framework	

RAMageddon has claimed yet another victim, with Framework now announcing a "major and unfortunate" pricing update for its upcoming premium laptop - which also impacts folks who preordered it. Memory configurations for the Laptop 13 Pro have been adjusted after Framework says it received cost updates from its memory supplier that "are more than double that of the prior inventory."
While Framework says it has enough LPCAMM2 memory modules on hand to cover all existing preorders, they're not the right mix of 64GB, 32GB, and 16GB modules to match all preorder configurations. The company is now notifying some customers that the memory configurat …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Framework高端笔记本电脑内存配置缩水
zh.summary: Framework由于内存供应商成本翻倍，宣布调整其Laptop 13 Pro的定价，导致配置变更和部分预订交货延迟。供应链中断凸显了高端硬件制造持续存在的挑战。

title: ServiceNow bets $40 million on Indian banking software specialist to expand its financial services push
summary: ServiceNow is investing $40 million in BusinessNext, an Indian banking software specialist, to expand its AI-powered financial services offerings globally. This strategic partnership positions both companies to accelerate their presence in enterprise banking technology.
content: ServiceNow's investment gives BusinessNext a strategic partner to expand its AI-powered banking software globally.

zh.title: ServiceNow投入4000万美元支持印度银行软件专家以扩展其金融服务业务
zh.summary: ServiceNow向印度银行软件专家BusinessNext投入4000万美元，以全球范围内扩展其AI驱动的金融服务产品。这一战略合作将帮助两家公司加快在企业银行技术领域的发展。

title: Orcas team up to ram sunfish until they explode
summary: Orcas have been observed working together to ram sunfish in coordinated attacks, a behavior researchers believe may help younger orcas learn to feed efficiently or serve a recreational purpose. The coordinated hunting strategy demonstrates sophisticated social learning among marine mammals.
content: “We think this may help younger orcas feed more easily, or it could also just be for fun.”

zh.title: 虎鲸集体撞击太阳鱼直到其爆炸
zh.summary: 研究人员观察到虎鲸通过协调一致的攻击方式撞击太阳鱼，这种行为可能帮助年轻虎鲸学习有效捕食或用于娱乐目的。这种协调的捕猎策略展现了海洋哺乳动物之间复杂的社会学习能力。

title: Lego’s Donkey Kong arcade machine lets Mario jump endless barrels — Miyamoto is reportedly happy
summary: Lego's $200 Donkey Kong arcade machine designed by Carl Merriam has reportedly won approval from Mario creator Shigeru Miyamoto. The working game set follows Lego's previous gaming nostalgia releases like the Game Boy and pinball machine.
content:
Carl Merriam has designed some of my favorite nostalgia-inducing Lego sets, including the Lego Nintendo Game Boy and Piranha Plant. He's assisted on the incredible Lion Knights' Castle, Galaxy Explorer, and Pirates of Barracuda Bay. 
Now, he's helped the company create a $200 Donkey Kong arcade machine set that managed to win even Mario creator Shigeru Miyamoto's favor - or so he's told.
It doesn't play quite like Donkey Kong, of course. Jumpman, the character that would be renamed Mario, can never reach the top under his own power. But like Lego's $230 pinball machine, it does contain a basic fully functional game. There's a working joyst …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 乐高大金刚街机让马里奥无限跳跃——据传宫本茂很满意
zh.summary: 据报道，由卡尔·梅里亚姆设计的价值200美元的乐高大金刚街机获得了马里奥创造者宫本茂的批准。这款可工作的游戏套装延续了乐高之前的游戏怀旧产品，如Game Boy和弹球机。
